# SteelR — Bespoke Steel Entrance Doors

> SteelR is a UK manufacturer and installer of bespoke steel entrance doors. Every door is made to order with full design consultation and professional nationwide installation.

## About

SteelR manufactures SR3-rated, ISO 9001 certified, Secured by Design approved steel entrance doors. We work with homeowners, architects and developers who require a high-security entrance that is both beautiful and impenetrable. All doors are manufactured in the United Kingdom from fire-rated steel.

## Products

- Contemporary steel entrance doors — clean lines, minimal hardware, modern glazing options
- Traditional steel entrance doors — ornate detailing, lion knockers, decorative panels, fanlights
- Double steel entrance doors — grand entrances for larger properties
- All doors available in any RAL colour with a choice of hardware finishes, glazing options, panel styles and decorative elements

## Certifications

- SR3 Rated — the highest level of physical security testing for entrance doors under European standards
- ISO 9001 Certified — quality management system certification
- Secured by Design — official UK police security initiative approval
- Fire Rated — manufactured from fire-rated steel meeting residential fire safety requirements

## Process

1. Enquiry — contact by phone (0800 861 1450) or online form to discuss property, brief and timeline
2. Survey — nationwide property visit for measurements and specification
3. Design — door designed to exact specification with colour, hardware, glazing, panel style and finish confirmed
4. Installation — professional installation, typically 8–12 weeks from enquiry to completion

## Contact

- Phone: 0800 861 1450 (Monday–Friday, 8am–6pm)
- Email: info@steelr.co.uk
- Website: https://steelr.co.uk
- Service area: Nationwide United Kingdom
